title: Virginia
excerpt:
Consumer Assistance in Virginia

Contact your state department of insurance to get consumer help with a health insurance problem or question.

Medicaid in Virginia

You can apply for Medicaid in Virginia by contacting your state Medicaid agency.

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® in Virginia

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® for Employees in Virginia

Health Insurance Marketplace® in Virginia

CHIP in Virginia

Family Access to Medical Insurance Security covers uninsured children in families with moderate incomes that are too high to qualify for Medicaid. You can find out whether your children qualify for Family Access to Medical Insurance Security right now. Fill out a Marketplace application and find out whether your children qualify. Learn more about Family Access to Medical Insurance Security in Virginia.
